project.name: UWC Smoketest
project.primaryColorNote: Design-phase handoff produced blue (#2563EB / Tailwind blue-600) rather than the briefed indigo (#4f46e5). Primary left as-is to preserve design-phase intent; focus rings use indigo-500 per a11y spec.

contactForm.fromAddress: onboarding@resend.dev (placeholder — swap for verified sender at launch)

honeypot.method: visually hidden via CSS offscreen positioning

contactForm.sendPattern: sendEmailSafely (fire-and-forget, catches errors, never crashes route)
contactForm.csrf: Astro security.checkOrigin default; same-origin fetch sends Origin automatically (LSN-002 covered)

accessibility.skipLink: first element in <body>, sr-only until focus, targets #main-content
accessibility.focusVisibleRing: focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500 on all interactive elements
accessibility.images: all replaced with from astro:assets; meaningful alt text; width/height set for CLS
accessibility.contrast: primary blue on white passes WCAG AA for normal text; no secondary/accent added

robotsTxt.sitemapDirective: intentionally omitted — add at launch when indexable flips true

secretsToSetAtLaunch: npx wrangler pages secret put RESEND_API_KEY
npx wrangler pages secret put CONTACT_EMAIL

deviationsFromBrief.reason: Design-phase output used blue across entire site; repainting the design was out of build-phase scope. Focus rings use indigo-500 per a11y spec.
Design-phase output was a dental practice. Build phase preserved vertical.

deviationsFromBrief.builtAs: Only index.astro + Layout.astro existed at start of build phase; BaseLayout, NavBar, about, and contact were created during build.
deviationsFromBrief.reason: Design phase did not produce these files; build phase created them to match the briefed 3-page structure.

knownIssues: Cloudflare adapter uses passthrough image service (no runtime image optimization). Remote Unsplash images are served as-is with explicit dimensions for CLS. Consider `imageService: "compile"` if any image becomes prerendered.
notifications.astro (pre-existing) bypasses BaseLayout and loads Tailwind from CDN — left untouched; it's a standalone mockup.
Resend `from` uses onboarding@resend.dev — valid only for Resend test mode. Swap to a verified sender domain at launch.

nextPhase.name: launch
todo: Swap robots.txt to allow + add Sitemap directive
Swap site URL in astro.config.mjs to production domain
